signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry + Intervention Risk
signals.text: USD/JPY at 156.92 — Iran's threat to the Strait of Hormuz introduces acute geopolitical tension, yet the 300bp Fed-BoJ carry advantage (Fed 3.75% vs BoJ 0.75%) sustains the pair's floor. JPY COT LF net short -88,543 (30.6% long) remains a crowded carry trade. While VIX at 17.5 indicates normal volatility, a break above 160.00 remains the key level for BoJ intervention risk. Carry dominates the regime until VIX exceeds 25.

signals.title: AUD/USD — COT vs Retail Divergence + RBA
signals.text: AUD/USD at 0.7200 — COT LF net long +48,299 (74.8% long) vs retail 90% short creates a massive institutional vs retail divergence. Retail is aggressively fading the uptrend ahead of the RBA meeting on 5 May. With RBA at 4.10% vs Fed 3.75% providing a 35bp carry premium and a hike bias in place, retail capitulation risk is high if the RBA delivers a hawkish surprise. Watch for a sustained break above 0.7250 to trigger a short squeeze.

signals.title: NZD/USD — COT vs OIS Divergence + RBNZ
signals.text: NZD/USD COT LF net short -16,833 (23.0% long) shows speculators are heavily fading the RBNZ's hawkish bias. With the RBNZ next meeting on 27 May and a hike bias active, the pair faces significant long-unwind or short-squeeze risk depending on upcoming data. NZD/USD at 0.5902 is currently supported by a 150bp USD carry advantage (Fed 3.75% vs RBNZ 2.25%), but the crowded spec short position leaves the pair vulnerable to any hawkish RBNZ rhetoric.

signals.title: EUR/USD — Correlation Break + ECB Bias
signals.text: EUR/USD vs EuroStoxx correlation at +0.726 vs 252d norm of -0.142 (z=+1.90σ) indicates a significant regime shift where EUR is trading as a proxy for European equity beta rather than a safe-haven or funding currency. ECB's Muller warns of accelerating inflation, supporting the ECB hold at 2.0%. However, the 175bp carry deficit vs the Fed (3.75%) keeps upside capped at 1.1800. Watch for the final Eurozone PMIs today to confirm if the equity-FX link holds.
